collection.title: NEXUS App Hub v11
collection.description: Data-driven modular portal based on v10, backed by a server-side artifact catalog compiler.

items.title: NEXUS v10 Classic Portal
items.description: The clean PeernetLobby app runtime v11 is based on.

items.title: NEXUS v10 Enhanced Portal
items.description: The rich v10 portal containing themes, sound, floating panels, and storage management ideas externalized in v11 libs.

items.title: PeerModGroove
items.description: Peer-synchronized modular audio app launched from v10/v11 rather than embedded into the hub runtime.

items.title: Sprite GIF Creator
items.description: Browser-only sprite-sheet splitter, frame editor, PNG exporter, and animated GIF assembler.

items.title: Hyperblast Shooter
items.description: Classic cyberpunk space shooter with multiplayer hooks, progression systems, story mode, and floating-panel support inherited from the v10 enhanced portal.

items.title: Classic Minesweeper
items.description: Standalone Minesweeper artifact with local best times.

items.title: Classic Solitaire
items.description: Standalone Klondike Solitaire artifact with scoring, undo, and best score persistence.

items.title: Artifacts Table of Contents
items.note: Repository-wide curated artifact list. v11 keeps this as information while generated JSON becomes the machine-readable catalog.

items.title: Server Guide
items.note: Local serving and deployment notes for the static artifact collection.

items.title: External Reference Example
items.description: Demonstrates that catalog entries can be pure external links without deployment copying.

items.title: v11 Modularization Roadmap
items.note: Specs and TODOs for feature areas intentionally not fully implemented in this slice.
